label: 暗调高级版
texture_guidance: 深色石材、暗木、金属边缘、玻璃反光、食材湿润高光。
scene_prompt: DARK PREMIUM DINING POSTER. light: single warm spotlight from upper right at 35 degrees, narrow highlight on hero dish, background falls into soft darkness; add subtle rim light on plate edge. material: dark stone tabletop, smoked glass, deep walnut wood, brushed metal, glossy sauce highlight, no cheap plastic. color: charcoal #111111, espresso #2A1812, warm amber #C7833A, ivory #F3E8D0, one restrained red or green accent under 8%. composition: hero dish or symbolic premium detail in lower center occupying 38-50%; large title in upper third, generous negative space around it; no more than one small badge. avoid: no noisy street scene, no full red-gold festival layout, no bright neon, no cartoon props, no overused gold 3D block title.
design_lessons: 高级感依赖克制光比、材质细节和留白，不靠堆金色装饰。
